simperiod: checkpoint sim period in ns used with BASE_CPT_* sequences
numcpt: Estimated number of checkpoints. When 0, count is calculated as sdl['clocks']/simperiod

db: sqlite database file to be created or updated
nodeclamp: distribute threads evenly across specified nodes

msgsPerPort: Number of msgs to inject per port

sweeps.name: sanity
sweeps.desc: run 4 and 8 threads for a fixed configuration
